protocol_notes: Reconstitution issue: vials appeared cloudy with suspended particles immediately upon reconstitution with Hospira BAC water. User held plunger to control water injection rate and let it drip down the side. First vial remained cloudy after ~5 minutes. Second vial remained cloudy after ~2 weeks. Supplier attributed issue to temperature or pH sensitivity of TA1. Recommended using phosphate buffered saline instead of Hospira BAC due to lower pH of latter.
